.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(167, 176, 179) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(167, 176, 179) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) no-repeat scroll 100% 3.75px / 12.375px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("app://obsidian.md/public/images/6155340132a851f6089e.svg") no-repeat scroll 100% 3.75px / 12.375px padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #FBFBFB 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#FBFBFB, color-mix(in srgb, #FBFBFB 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #FBFBFB 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#FBFBFB, color-mix(in srgb, #FBFBFB 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(167, 176, 179) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h6[data-heading=\"This is a heading 6\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(146, 161, 161) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li[data-line=\"0\"]::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(211, 255, 164) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(251, 251, 251) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
